assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 9-13 show JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 27-29: "Step 4.4 filters JQL results to match the current issue's stream. The current issue TC-8021 has stream suffix [rhtpa-2.1]. TC-8022's summary contains (rhtpa-2.1), which matches. Therefore TC-8022 is confirmed as the preemptive task for this stream."

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 35-44: Section titled 'Link TC-8021 to TC-8022 with "Depend" link type' with code showing jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend"). Also confirmed in triage-outcome.md line 38: "Link Created | TC-8021 --Depend--> TC-8022".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 47-58: Shows current_labels including 'security-preemptive' and updated_labels without it: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]. Line 49 states: "The preemptive task is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021), so the security-preemptive label is no longer appropriate. It transitions from a preemptive task to a standard remediation task."

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 29: "Because Step 4.4 recorded that remediation already exists for stream rhtpa-2.1, Step 7 skipped remediation task creation entirely. No duplicate tasks were created." Also triage-outcome.md line 40: "Remediation Task Creation | **Skipped** — TC-8022 already provides remediation for this stream".
